# unifi_firewall_policy (List Resource)

List firewall policies in a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all firewall policies in the default site
list "unifi_firewall_policy" "all" {
  provider = unifi
}

# List firewall policies in a specific site
list "unifi_firewall_policy" "site_policies" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    site = "my-site"
  }
}

# List only enabled firewall policies
list "unifi_firewall_policy" "enabled" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    filter {
      name  = "enabled"
      value = "true"
    }
  }
}

# List firewall policies by action
list "unifi_firewall_policy" "blocks" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    filter {
      name  = "action"
      value = "BLOCK"
    }
  }
}

# List a firewall policy by name
list "unifi_firewall_policy" "by_name" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    filter {
      name  = "name"
      value = "Allow Web"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `site` (String) The name of the site to list firewall policies from.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the filter to apply. Supported values are: `name`, `action`, `enabled`.
- `value` (String) The value to filter by.
